Article.ArticleTitle: The SARAH trial: more evidence on the role of neurohormonal blockers in prevention of anthracycline-induced cardiotoxicity.

Abstract.AbstractText: This mini-review highlights the results of the SARAH trial, which evaluated the efficacy of sacubitril/valsartan in preventing subclinical cardiac dysfunction in patients undergoing anthracycline-based chemotherapy. The trial demonstrated a significant reduction in GLS decline in the treatment group compared to placebo. The findings are discussed in context with other trials investigating neurohormonal blockade for the prevention of cancer therapy-related cardiac dysfunction.

Chemical.NameOfSubstance: sacubitril and valsartan sodium hydrate drug combination

MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: Declarations. Conflict of interest: Myhre has received a lecture and advisory board honorarium from Novartis.
